message.content:
@startuml
title Loading Team page (no refresh)

participant "TeamLive" as TL1 #E6E8FA;#003274;line:green;text:black;fontSize=9px
participant "Backlog" as B1  #FDEBD5 ;line:red;text:white;fontColor:#FFAABB;backgroundGradient:linear;topToBottom|#FFEEDD|white
database Persistence   #DDFFFF;line:blue;text:white;fontColor:#AAEEBB;backgroundGradient:diamond;leftToright|#CCFFFF|white


TL1 ->>B1 : backlog(team_id,refresh:false); 
activate TL1 

note over TL1,B1  
    This note spans multiple participants...
end note 


deactivate TL1  

@enduml
